name: bmb_vegetarian_contradiction
description: User claims vegetarian, then mentions eating steak. System must detect BOTH state, not overwrite.

evidence.content: User stated: I'm vegetarian
User stated: I ate steak yesterday

name: bmb_remote_work_preference
description: User prefers remote work, then moves to office job. System must revise with evidence chain.

evidence.content: User said they prefer working from home
User moved to a full-time office job

name: bmb_allergic_contradiction
description: User says allergic to peanuts, then orders pad thai with peanuts.

evidence.content: User warned restaurant about peanut allergy
User ordered pad thai with peanuts at a different restaurant

name: bmb_morning_evening_person
description: User says morning person but calendar shows late-night activity.

evidence.content: User self-reported as a morning person in survey
Usage analytics show 80% of activity between 10pm-2am

name: bmb_budget_contradiction
description: User says budget-conscious, then makes luxury purchase.

evidence.content: User uses multiple coupon apps and compares prices
User purchased a luxury watch for $5000

name: bmb_contradiction_resolved_by_retraction
description: Contradiction arises, then one side is retracted. System should return to single truth state.

evidence.content: User said they love dogs
User adopted two cats

name: bmb_traffic_revision_chain
description: Two conflicting traffic reports, then a third confirms one side. Tests AGM revision.

evidence.content: API report: traffic moderate on highway 101
User report: traffic is very heavy, took 2 hours
Updated API confirms heavy traffic on highway 101

name: bmb_medical_revision
description: Initial diagnosis revised with new test results. Tests incremental revision.

evidence.content: Initial blood test suggests condition X
MRI scan confirms condition X markers

name: bmb_stock_revision
description: Belief about stock price revised with contradicting data, then confirmed.

evidence.content: Analyst report: ACME fundamentals strong
Market crash: sector-wide sell-off
ACME beats earnings estimates by 30%, stock rebounds

name: bmb_policy_revision_recency
description: Older evidence superseded by newer evidence on the same topic.

actions.label: store_old
actions.claim: company policy allows remote work on Fridays

evidence.content: 2023 employee handbook states remote Fridays allowed
2024 policy update: remote Fridays discontinued

name: bmb_revision_strengthening
description: Multiple supporting evidence items strengthen a belief progressively.

actions.label: store_initial
actions.claim: user is a senior software engineer

evidence.content: User mentioned 8 years of coding experience
LinkedIn shows Staff Engineer title at FAANG
Published 3 tech talks at major conferences

name: bmb_revision_weakening
description: Attacking evidence weakens a belief but does not flip it until third piece.

evidence.content: SLA dashboard shows 99.95% uptime last quarter
Major outage lasting 4 hours reported

name: bmb_explain_employment_change
description: User employment changes; explain() must return evidence chain with timestamps.

evidence.content: Alice mentioned working at Google
Alice announced she moved to Anthropic

name: bmb_explain_retracted_evidence
description: Evidence is retracted; explain() must show expired evidence separately.

evidence.content: User address on file shows NYC
Coworker confirmed user lives in NYC area

name: bmb_explain_multi_source
description: Multiple sources support a belief; explain() must enumerate all.

evidence.content: User completed advanced Python certification
User has 50+ Python repos on GitHub
User teaches Python at a bootcamp

name: bmb_explain_attack_chain
description: Explain a belief with both supporting and attacking evidence.

evidence.content: Product X has 4.8 star rating from 10000 reviews
Product X has 99.5% satisfaction rate
Recent batch recall due to defect affecting 5% of units

name: bmb_explain_no_hallucination
description: Query a belief that was never stored; explain must return no evidence, not hallucinate.

name: bmb_explain_confidence_matches_evidence
description: Confidence should reflect evidence weight; strong support = high confidence.

evidence.content: User holds DALF C2 French certification
User conducted a 2-hour interview in French

name: bmb_prediction_decay_3days
description: A prediction's confidence should decay significantly after 3+ days (half-life = 3 days).

evidence.content: Weather forecast says rain tomorrow

name: bmb_fact_no_decay
description: A fact (half-life 365 days) should persist after 30 days.

evidence.content: User verified birthday on government ID

name: bmb_preference_gradual_decay
description: A preference (half-life 90 days) should lose confidence over 180 days.

evidence.content: User toggled dark mode on

name: bmb_inference_decay_medium
description: An inference (half-life 30 days) should decay after 60 days.

actions.label: store_inference
actions.claim: user is interested in machine learning

evidence.content: User read 5 ML articles this week

actions.label: query_ml
actions.claim: user is interested in machine learning

name: bmb_temporal_fresh_beats_stale
description: Fresh evidence on same belief should have higher effective weight than stale evidence.

evidence.content: User started a Rust tutorial
User published a Rust crate on crates.io

name: bmb_prediction_with_time_validity
description: A prediction with explicit time_validity should expire when that time passes.

actions.label: store_pred
actions.claim: user will attend the conference next week

evidence.content: User confirmed attendance for next week's conference

actions.label: query_conference
actions.claim: user will attend the conference next week

name: bmb_sandbox_server_overload
description: Hypothetical: what if server load exceeds capacity? Sandbox simulation without modifying canonical.

evidence.content: Load test shows max capacity at 1000 users
Monitoring dashboard shows 900 active users

name: bmb_sandbox_pricing_change
description: What-if analysis: what if we change pricing? Sandbox explores without affecting canonical beliefs.

evidence.content: Current price tag shows $49.99

name: bmb_sandbox_diet_change
description: What if user changed diet? Sandbox explores hypothetical without modifying real beliefs.

evidence.content: User stated they are vegan for 3 years

name: bmb_sandbox_deployment_risk
description: What if deployment fails? Sandbox explores risk without modifying production beliefs.

evidence.content: All CI/CD checks pass, last 10 deploys successful

name: bmb_sandbox_market_scenario
description: Market crash scenario: sandbox explores downside without affecting canonical market beliefs.

evidence.content: VIX at historic lows, S&P at all-time high

name: bmb_sandbox_hiring_decision
description: What if we hire candidate X? Explore hypothetical with sandbox, then discard.

evidence.content: HR records show 5 engineers on the team

name: bmb_consolidation_basic
description: 3 similar language proficiency claims compress into semantic belief via consolidation

evidence.content: Language test confirmed fluent Spanish ability
Teacher noted Spanish proficiency
User demonstrated fluent Spanish communication

name: bmb_consolidation_preserves_query
description: Semantic belief is retrievable after consolidation

evidence.content: Language exam confirmed fluent French
Teacher reported French proficiency
Colleague noted good French communication skills

name: bmb_consolidation_pruning
description: Low-confidence episodics pruned post-consolidation

evidence.content: Uncertain observation about tea preference
Vague note that user may prefer drinking tea
Weak signal: user possibly enjoys tea

name: bmb_consolidation_skips_both
description: BOTH-state beliefs excluded from consolidation; normal cluster still processes safely

evidence.content: User claimed to be vegetarian
User was seen eating steak
User mentioned jogging in the park
User tracks runs outdoors daily
User set a goal for running outside every morning

name: bmb_consolidation_confidence_agg
description: Consolidated belief confidence reflects weighted aggregate of source beliefs

actions.label: store_conf1
actions.claim: user wakes up early every morning

evidence.content: User reported waking up at 5am

actions.label: store_conf2
actions.claim: user gets up early each morning

evidence.content: Sleep tracker shows consistent 5:30am wake time

actions.label: store_conf3
actions.claim: user wakes up early every day

evidence.content: Calendar shows 5am meetings booked regularly

name: bmb_consolidation_no_undersized_cluster
description: Clusters below min_cluster_size not consolidated — only 2 similar beliefs provided

actions.label: store_pair1
actions.claim: user prefers window seats on flights

evidence.content: User always selects window seat when booking

actions.label: store_pair2
actions.claim: user likes to sit by the window on planes

evidence.content: Flight records show consistent window seat preference

name: bmb_multihop_dietary_constraint
description: Multi-hop retrieval links dietary constraint to restaurant choice via shared source

evidence.content: Medical report confirmed gluten intolerance
User requested gluten-free menu when dining out
Nutritionist confirmed user must avoid wheat and barley

name: bmb_multihop_causal_chain
description: 3-hop causal chain retrieved via graph traversal

evidence.content: User reported high stress from deadlines

actions.label: store_sleep
actions.claim: stress causes user to have poor sleep

evidence.content: Sleep tracker shows disrupted sleep correlated with work stress

actions.label: store_fatigue
actions.claim: poor sleep leads to user fatigue during the day

evidence.content: User reports daytime fatigue linked to poor sleep quality

name: bmb_multihop_direct_query
description: Simple direct query succeeds in both standard and multihop modes

evidence.content: User introduced themselves as Alice

name: bmb_multihop_cross_domain
description: Beliefs across domains linked by shared entity via graph

evidence.content: User's registered address is in San Francisco

actions.label: store_job
actions.claim: user works at a tech company in the Bay Area

evidence.content: LinkedIn profile shows Bay Area tech employment

actions.label: store_commute
actions.claim: user commutes by bicycle in San Francisco

evidence.content: User mentioned cycling to work in the city

name: bmb_multihop_evidence_provenance
description: Retrieval follows evidence dependency edges from shared source

evidence.content: Blood panel from 2024 annual checkup shows elevated LDL

actions.label: store_finding2
actions.claim: user should reduce saturated fat intake

evidence.content: Doctor recommended reducing saturated fat based on 2024 checkup results

name: bmb_multihop_retracted_excluded
description: Retracted beliefs excluded from graph traversal; remaining beliefs still retrievable

evidence.content: Old address record shows New York residence
Relocation confirmed via updated mailing address

name: bmb_separation_similar_claims
description: Very similar claims trigger orthogonalisation to prevent false merging

evidence.content: User requested vegetarian options when dining
User specifically asked for fully vegan menus

name: bmb_separation_distinct_claims
description: Dissimilar claims don't trigger separation

evidence.content: User mentioned weekend mountain hikes

actions.label: store_engineer
actions.claim: user works as a software engineer

evidence.content: Resume lists software engineering as occupation

name: bmb_separation_preserves_retrieval
description: Both beliefs remain retrievable after separation

evidence.content: Allergy test positive for peanuts

actions.label: store_treenut
actions.claim: user is allergic to tree nuts

evidence.content: Allergy test positive for tree nuts

name: bmb_separation_prevents_false_merge
description: Similar but distinct beliefs not deduplicated after separation

evidence.content: Employee ID badge confirms Google employment

actions.label: store_interviewed_google
actions.claim: user used to work at Google

evidence.content: Resume shows Google as a previous employer

name: bmb_separation_no_contradiction
description: Similar non-contradictory claims don't produce BOTH state

evidence.content: User always orders black coffee with no sugar
User frequently orders espresso shots

name: bmb_separation_blocks_false_consolidation
description: Separated similar-but-distinct beliefs processed safely by consolidation

actions.label: store_google_sf
actions.claim: user works at Google San Francisco office

evidence.content: Badge access logs show SF office entry

actions.label: store_google_nyc
actions.claim: user interviewed at Google New York City office

evidence.content: Interview invite sent from Google NYC recruiter

actions.label: store_google_campus
actions.claim: user visited Google Mountain View campus

evidence.content: Visitor log shows campus visit for tech tour
